violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Eggs, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Milk was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The door to the outside, located in the hallway directly outside kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026
Per interview with PIC, dishwasher was not operable and waiting on part. Equipment to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as chicken base) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as chicken base during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (hot water dispenser) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
